title.ko: 휴대용 또는 특별히 운반에 적합하도록 구성된 조명장치 또는 시스템
title.en: LIGHTING DEVICES OR SYSTEMS THEREOF, BEING PORTABLE OR SPECIALLY ADAPTED FOR TRANSPORTATION

definition.ko: 전기적 장치 시스템 F21L F21L2/00 배터리나 전지(CELL)를 내장한 것 F21L F21L4/00 발전기를 내장한 것 F21L F21L13/00 자체전원이 없는 것 F21L F21L4/00 비전기적 장치 토치, 플레어(FLARER); 랜턴 F21L17/00; 19/00 포켓 램프; 광부용 손전등 F21L21/00; 23/00 그 외의 휴대용 조명 장치 또는 그 시스템 F21L26/00 전기적 및 비전기적 장치의 조합 F21L27/00

title.ko: 전기 조명장치 시스템(전기적인 것과 비전기적인 것, 두가지 모두의 광원 또는 치환가능한 광원을 가지는 시스템 F21L 27/00)
title.en: Systems of electric lighting devices (systems employing both electric and non-electric light sources or exchangeable light sources F21L0027000000)
Electric lighting devices with self-contained electric batteries or cells
characterised by provision of two or more light sources
characterised by provision of a light source housing portion adjustably fixed to the remainder of the device
with light source coupled to the remainder of the device solely by cable
characterised by means for in situ recharging of the batteries or cells

title.ko: 발전기를 내장한 전기 조명 장치(광전지를 갖는 것 4/00)
title.en: Electric lighting devices with built-in electric generators (with solar cells F21L0004000000)
with fluid drive
actuated by hand
with mechanical drive, e.g. spring
by reciprocating pusher actuated by hand
Electric lighting devices without a self-contained power source, e.g. for mains connection
capable of hand-held use, e.g. inspection lamps
carried on wheeled supports
Non-electric torches; Non-electric flares
Lanterns, e.g. hurricane lamps or candle lamps
Non-electric pocket-lamps, e.g. lamps producing sparks
Non-electric hand-lamps for miners

title.ko: 그룹 F21L 17/00 ~ F21L 23/00으로 분류되지 않는, 비전기적 휴대용 조명 장치 또는 그 시스템
title.en: Non-electric portable lighting devices, or systems thereof, not provided for in groups F21L0017000000-F21L0023000000

Lighting devices or systems, employing combinations of electric and non-electric light sources; Replacing or exchanging electric light sources with non-electric light sources or vice versa in lighting devices or systems
